_note: Canonical digital SAT content taxonomy. Drives the skill-rules folder tree and name validation. Slugs are folder/file names; 'label' is the human-facing name. If College Board revises the framework, update here and update the skill-rules tree to match.
_terminology: Hierarchy is subject -> topic -> skill. 'topic' = e.g. Algebra (College Board's own term for this level is 'domain'); 'skill' = e.g. Linear equations in one variable (College Board also calls this level a 'skill'). This tool uses subject/topic/skill throughout.

skills.systems-of-two-linear-equations-in-two-v: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
skills.linear-inequalities-in-one-or-two-variab: Linear inequalities in one or two variables

skills.nonlinear-equations-in-one-variable-and-: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables

skills.ratios-rates-proportional-relationships-: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
skills.one-variable-data-distributions-and-meas: One-variable data: distributions and measures of center and spread
skills.inference-from-sample-statistics-and-mar: Inference from sample statistics and margin of error
skills.evaluating-statistical-claims-observatio: Evaluating statistical claims: observational studies and experiments
